_notes.rate_model: USD FOB is converted to RMB (fob_usd * usd_to_rmb) then to Naira (* rmb_to_ngn). RMB FOB uses rmb_to_ngn directly.
_notes.usd_to_rmb: USD->RMB market rate. Default 7.2 — editable in the admin panel.
_notes.logistics_service_ngn: Combined logistics + service fee, shown as one line. Editable in the admin panel.
_notes.cbm: KUAILUZX / High-Power CBM is ESTIMATED from container capacity. Leilin CBM is computed from real carton packing dimensions.
_notes.formula: customer_price_ngn = (cbm * shipping_per_cbm_ngn) + logistics_service_ngn + (fob * rate); rate = rmb_to_ngn if RMB else usd_to_rmb * rmb_to_ngn
